symbols.name: _hints
symbols.docstring: Cached ``get_type_hints`` — expensive enough to be worth memoizing.

symbols.name: _field_names
symbols.docstring: Cached tuple of dataclass field names.

symbols.name: to_dict
symbols.docstring:
Recursively convert a dataclass tree to plain Python data.

    Dataclasses become dicts, enums become their value, lists/tuples are
    converted element-wise. Anything else (str, int, None, ...) passes
    through.

symbols.name: from_dict
symbols.docstring:
Recursively construct a dataclass tree from plain Python data.

    Inverse of :func:`to_dict`. Handles nested dataclasses, enums, and
    optional/union/list annotations. Unknown keys in the input dict are
    silently ignored (forwards compatibility with new fields); missing
    keys fall back to the dataclass field's default.

symbols.name: to_json
symbols.docstring: Serialize a dataclass tree to JSON.

symbols.name: from_json
symbols.docstring: Deserialize a JSON string into a dataclass tree of type ``cls``.

symbols.name: _coerce
symbols.docstring: Convert ``value`` to ``target_type``, recursing into nested types.
